summary: Excellent concert with standout Jack Straw and Desolation Row, Phil Lesh at his best; recording source unknown
review: The reviewer raves about the show’s superb quality, highlighting a powerful rendition of Jack Straw and an inspired Desolation Row, while noting that Phil Lesh was in top form. No specific comments on the recording itself were provided.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review praises the musical performance strongly; no data on recording quality, so rating leans heavily on show quality with limited confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No technical details mentioned in the review.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer expresses overall happiness and high energy throughout the concert.

band_member_comments.Phil: Phil Lesh is described as being at his best.
